results.query: What is the site address and GLR Survey No. mentioned in the notice dated 14th December, 2001 in the Usha Kapoor case?
results.answer: Elgin Road, bearing General Land Register (GLR) Survey No.214.

results.query: Who are the appellants in Civil Appeal No. 1844 of 2008?
Which Governor General-in-Council Order was cited in the resumption notice in the Usha Kapoor judgment?
results.answer: The Governor General-in-Council Order cited in the resumption notice in the Usha Kapoor judgment is Order No. 179 of 1836.
